title: Report Waste
location_error: Could not get your location. Please enable GPS.
description_label: Describe what you found (optional but recommended)
description_placeholder: e.g., Large pile of plastic bottles near the road…
photo_required: Please add a photo of the waste before submitting.
saved_offline: Saved offline — will sync automatically when you're back online.
saved_network: Saved — will sync when you're back online.
submit_failed: Failed to submit report. Please try again.
camera_note: Your photo helps verify the report. Camera access is only used when you take a photo — we never access it in the background.
